title: Phoenix Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Phoenix with a Z-Score of +3.46. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Phoenix has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The temperature is causing a significant increase in cooling degree days (CDD) with a value of 11.1 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 17% and wind speed is at 3.0 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
